notes.duplicate_terms: Python dictionaries cannot represent duplicate term names; didbjs validates duplicate named R vectors directly.
notes.extra_effect_se: Pinned Python ignores extra SE names because it indexes only estimate keys; didbjs fails closed under D013/F042.
notes.alpha_limits: Pinned Python accepts alpha boundary values and produces degenerate/non-finite intervals; didbjs fails closed under D013/F042.
